data.title: McKesson Shares Up Over 2% After Key Signal
data.description: McKesson shares demonstrated a Power Inflow at $681.16, signaling a possible entry for traders, after which MCK rose up to 2.1%.

data.title: Jeff Bezos' Amazon To Launch Kuiper Internet Satellites On April 9, Taking On Elon Musk's Starlink
data.description: In a stride towards the initiation of its commercial service, Amazon Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) is set to launch its long-awaited Kuiper internet satellites on April 9.

data.title: RxSight Warns On FY25 Revenue As Premium Cataract Market Faces Headwinds, Stock Plunges
data.description: RxSight shares down premarket on revised FY25 outlook. CEO cites headwinds in premium IOL market and economy.

data.title: FDA Delays Full Approval Decision On Novavax's COVID-19 Vaccine (UPDATED)
data.description: Novavax's COVID-19 vaccine received FDA Emergency Use Authorization, but full approval faces delays as regulators request more data beyond the April 1 deadline.

data.title: Bitcoin's First Real Test in an Uncertain Economy: Key Levels to Watch Amid Tariff Pressures
